home.hero_desc: Discover local businesses, explore unique products, and support your community’s commerce.
home.categories_subtitle: What are you looking for today?
home.map_desc: See the points of sale closest to your location. Find physical stores, food spots, and much more on a dynamic map.
home.call_to_action_desc: Thousands of products await you. Join the largest local commerce network in the region.

browse.title: Explore Products
browse.desc: Discover amazing products from nearby businesses.

reservas.title: My reservativons
reservas.description: Manage your reserved products and receive real-time payment notifications.
reservas.advise2: When you click on `ALREADY PAID`, the seller will receive an immediate notification to verify your payment and ship the product to you.
